message:
refactor: migrate remaining 7 e2e tests to test_e2e_framework.sh (bd-89zv)

Complete the migration of all e2e test files to use the standardized
test_e2e_framework.sh. This batch covers prune, repo_spec, review,
status, sync_clone, sync_edge_cases, and sync_pull tests.

All 12 e2e test files now use the shared framework, eliminating ~1000
lines of duplicated setup/teardown/assertion code across the test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
